form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track beaten 8 m by Sinbinned (1:54.40) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $17. At the start before was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th-8.05 beaten 12 m by Deecee Rockin (1:58.00) in NR up to 45 on March 19 at $18. Expected to do much better this time.

form.formComment: Resumed when over this distance beaten 12 m sixth behind Our Angels Envy at Menangle in a 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 31. Expect a much better run this time.

Passing the 600m hampered by Jogalong Blue.

form.formComment: Showed improvement last start when 2nd (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 1.1 m by Captain Groove (1:53.50) in NR up to 63 on April 2 at $41. Prefer others on this occasion.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Sr4) over 1770m at Canberra beaten 12 m by Uncle Craigo (2:10.50) in NR up to 48 on March 9 at $3.90. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 6 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Temora (2:) beating Hes A Terror in NR 43 to 48 on March 3 at $1.70 at the bell was leading 4. Great chance to bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr8) over 2030m at this track, beaten 30 m by Grace Shannon (2:28.50) in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $8. form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 1609m NR up to 45 on March 19. Hasn't drawn the best again but he is a strong winning chance.
